productDisplayName: Puma Men Alonso Track Red Ferrari Jacket
description: CompositionRed track jacket made of 100% polyester that has ribbed collar, cuffs and hemline, zippered closure, long sleeves with contoured panels, brand logo embroidered on the left sleeve cuff, Alonso name printed on the right sleeve, right chest and centre back, two insert pockets on the sides on the front and Scudera ferrari badge on the left chest FittingRegularWash care Gentle machine wash in cool water Do not bleach Do not tumble dry Cool iron Do not dry clean Wash with similar colours Use only mild detergent Wash and iron inside out Close all fastenings Take training to the next level with this Scudera Ferrari training jacket from puma. The long sleeves, contoured panels and ribbed hemline, collar and cuffs, all ensure a snug Fit. The Scudera Ferrari badge and the name of the Formula One racer - Fernando Alonso over the right chest gives this jacket a winning edge. Team this with track pants or jeans and performance footwear from the wide collection available at myntra for workouts or casual occassions.Model StatisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-19"
